title: CAPIT Sitewide Microcopy
description: Reusable labels and small interface copy for CAPIT.
headline: Sitewide Microcopy
body: Reusable content snippets for CAPIT’s local editing workflow.

sections.heading: Labels
sections.body: Header Button: Buy CAPIT. External Link Label: Opens external site. Provenance Badge: Source-linked. Freshness Badge: Verified on [Date]. Revision Badge: Revised. Partial Coverage Badge: Limited Coverage. Beta Badge: Beta. Copy Link Toast: Link copied.

sections.heading: Banners
sections.body: Cookie Banner: CAPIT uses necessary cookies and optional analytics tools. Manage your preferences below. Wallet Safety Banner: We will never ask for your secret recovery phrase or private keys.

sections.heading: Homepage Tagline Options
sections.body: Public records, clearly tracked. Well-plugging data with transparent token mechanics. Track the record. Review the method. Follow the protocol. Verified records. State-by-state context. Transparent reporting.

sections.heading: Final Placeholder Checklist
sections.body: Replace [Legal Entity Name], [privacy@yourdomain.com], [legal@yourdomain.com], [support@yourdomain.com], [Legal Mailing Address], [Network], [Full Contract Address], [Block Explorer URL], [Repository URL], [Disclosure Version], and [Response Time] before launch.
